job_to_be_done: Look up Ethereum network metadata, wallet balances, and transaction receipts using a connected MetaMask account, with strict address validation and staged safety controls.
summary_for_model: Read-only Ethereum JSON-RPC lookups (chain id, balance, transaction receipt) for MetaMask-connected wallets. Requires EIP-55 checksummed addresses. Quote/payment flows are stubbed for staged rollout.
trigger_conditions: The owner asks for the chain/network ID or basic network metadata for a wallet session.
The owner asks to check the ETH balance of a specific Ethereum address (must be EIP-55 checksummed).
The owner provides a transaction hash and asks for its on-chain receipt/status.
do_not_use_when: The request would broadcast a transaction or sign data; Phase 2/3 are not implemented in this listing.

address.description: EIP-55 checksummed Ethereum address (0x + 40 hex, mixed-case checksum). Required when action=balance.

tx_hash.description: Transaction hash (0x + 64 hex). Required when action=tx_receipt.

expected_chain_id.description: Optional expected chain id (decimal). If provided and the RPC reports a different chain id, the call fails with a network mismatch receipt.

summary.description: One-line summary suitable for the owner UI.

chain_id.description: Chain id as a decimal string (e.g. '1').

balance_wei.description: Balance in wei as a base-10 string.

balance_eth.description: Balance in ETH as a decimal string.

tx_receipt.description: Raw transaction receipt object as returned by JSON-RPC, or empty if not available.

amount_usd.description: Payment-tier required field. For Phase 1 read-only calls this is always 0.

usage_hints: Default to action='chain_id' if the owner is vague.
Reject any address that is not strict EIP-55 checksummed; ask the owner for the checksummed form.
If expected_chain_id is provided, fail conservatively on mismatch and ask the owner to switch networks.
result_hints: For balances, show chain_id and network before reporting balance_eth and balance_wei.
For receipts, summarize status and block number if present, then include the raw tx_receipt object.
error_hints: If invalid address, explain that strict EIP-55 checksum is required and ask for the checksummed address.
If network mismatch, tell the owner the expected and actual chain ids and ask them to switch networks.
If RPC timeout, ask the owner to retry or use a different RPC endpoint.
approval_summary_template: MetaMask Connector staged rollout: Phase 1 read-only lookup for {action}.
side_effect_summary: Phase 1 has no external side effects (read-only JSON-RPC lookups). Phase 2/3 for signing/broadcast is intentionally not implemented in this listing.
refund_or_cancellation_note: No refunds for on-chain gas; subscription cancellations stop future access but do not reverse blockchain transactions.
